summary: Completed comprehensive testing of QuantChat social messaging app. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). All 9 frontend UI tests passed. App features working: JWT auth, login/register, user search, conversations, message sending, settings, logout.

minor.issue: RuntimeWarning: coroutine 'AsyncServer.enter_room' was never awaited - FIXED by adding await

critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py is 565 lines - within acceptable range but could be split into routes modules for better maintainability
React Router v6 future flag warnings in console - consider adding v7_startTransition and v7_relativeSplatPath flags to BrowserRouter for smoother v7 migration
seed_data_creation: Demo users (Arjun, Priya, Rahul, Neha) and Admin seeded automatically on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: QuantChat MVP fully functional. Backend API tests in /app/backend/tests/test_quantchat_api.py cover auth, users, conversations, messages, stories. Frontend tested via Playwright - login, register, chat app layout, user search, messaging, settings, logout all working. Socket.IO real-time messaging working. Dark theme with pure black (#000000) background confirmed.

backend: POST /api/auth/login - JWT auth with demo credentials
frontend: Login page loads with dark theme
Chat app 3-column layout (sidebar, chat list, chat view)
